mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_mcp_servers WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_mcp_servers(project_id, name, transport, target, enabled) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.name}, #{description.transport, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.target}, #{description.enabled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_mcp_servers SET name = #{description.name}, transport = #{description.transport, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target = #{description.target}, enabled = #{description.enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}
